gas_flow.desc: Consistent gas flow conditions applied during annealing.

program.desc: The temperatures and gradients used during annealing.

start_temp.desc: Initial temperature at start of program.

embedded.desc: Attachment content embedded as raw `utf-8` line strings.

file_name.desc: The name of the attached file (with extension)

path.desc: The filepath to the attached file, relative to the directory containing the parent `FileBlock`.

time.desc: How long the temperature was kept constant in this section.

amount.desc: Amount of the material that was used.

env.desc: What atmospheric environment the material is stored in. (e.g., ambient, Ar(g))

form.desc: Physical shape or state of the material **at time of acquisition** (e.g., powder, shot, wire, lump). If the material was modified after aquiring but before use in the synthesis (e.g., grinding into powder, drying, etc.), these actions should be specified in the *material's* treatments property (not the synthesis treatments).

name.desc: A unique name for the material.

treatments.desc: Treatments that were applied to the material before use in the synthesis.

type.desc: How it was used in the synthesis (e.g., reagent, flux, solvent)

description.desc: A brief description of the intent for the file (characteristic methods, target products, template category, etc.).

fos_id.desc: A reaction ID unique within the scope of the applicable context. (e.g., a synthesis ID, template ID, etc.)

fos_type.desc: What type of `FileBlock` subclass the file should be interpreted as.

characterizations.desc: Description of characterization methods used to determine/quantitate the product.

expected.desc: Whether or not the product was expected from the synthesis.

expected_amount.desc: How much of the product was nominally expected to be obtained from the synthesis

name.desc: A unique name for the product.

obtained.desc: Whether or not the product obtained from the synthesis.

obtained_amount.desc: How much of the product was actually obtained from the synthesis..

structure_comments.desc: General description of the structure of the product.

medium.desc: What medium the reaction vessel was quenched in (e.g., water, air).

rate.desc: The sign-sensitive rate at which temperature was changed to get to the new temperature. (Increase -> positive, Decrease -> negative).

temp.desc: The next temperature in the program.

time.desc: Length of time from the previous temperature to the new temperature.

nominal_amount.desc: Total amount expected to be recovered from all final products.

nominal_formula.desc: Total expected chemical composition from all final products.

rename.desc: Maps default expected property names to custom names. Useful for when expected properties *are* present and matching descriptions, but the default name doesn't align with the niche context. (e.g., `"experimenters"` might be mapped to the more generic `"collaborators"` for computational or meta-contexted FOS files.)

cif.desc: A single attached CIF file applicable to the entire synthesis.

cifs.desc: Multiple attached CIF files applicable to the entire synthesis.

equipment.desc: Specialized equipment or apparatuses used during the synthesis.

experimenters.desc: Experimenters who participated in any treatments described in the synthesis.

laboratory_conditions.desc: General conditions of the laboratory during the synthesis.

materials.desc: Starting chemicals and materials used in the synthesis.

products.desc: Products expected or obtained from the synthesis.

reaction.desc: General information applying to the entire synthetic reaction.

treatments.desc: Sequence of individual actions performed on the materials or active reaction to carry out the synthesis.

group_id.desc: The unique identifier for the generating research group or organization.

project_id.desc: Describes the context or purpose of the synthesis within the scope of the `group_id` and/or lead experimenter.

template_name.desc: An unique name for the template.

anneal_sections.desc: A list of incomplete templates describing annealing sections.

annealings.desc: A list of incomplete templates describing annealing treatments.

cifs.desc: A list of CIF files attached to the template set.

experimenters.desc: A list of incomplete templates describing experimenters.

materials.desc: A list of incomplete templates describing materials.

treatments.desc: A list of incomplete templates describing treatments.

end_time.desc: What time the treatment was finished

recovered_amount.desc: How much material was recovered after treatment.

repeats.desc: How many times the treatment was performed in succession *uninterrupted*. If other treatments are performed between repeats, add a different treatment block after the interrupting treatments.

start_time.desc: What time the treatment was started

type.desc: What type of treatment was performed.
